checkin.journal:
The day of the trip has come, I am so happy to see everyone, my mental state is disaster as my pulse has been 65 during night over 70 and same base level has persisted over whole night
Woke up at 3 - been super bad trying to fall asleep didnt work
Finished packing did some work
Cosita made me breakfast
Trip with guys to istanbul and then antalya
Massage at resort / was so so nothing amazing 
Met and hugged all the guys at Italian reataurant
Had a call with Alex Soul guide
I felt bad but also goo
